summary: Team Welcome Dashboard feature testing complete. All 10 features tested successfully. Backend API returns role-specific data for Admin, HR, and RM. Frontend correctly renders the welcome dashboard with personalized greeting, quick stats, quick actions, and recent activity for each role.

admin_welcome_page_elements.detail: Greeting 'Good morning, Admin', 4 quick stats (Total Venues: 80, Total Leads: 170, Team Members: 92, Pending Reviews: 0), 6 quick actions, Recent Activity with 5 items

hr_welcome_page_elements.detail: Greeting 'Good morning, Meera Kapoor', 3 role-specific stats (Total Staff: 28, Pending Verification: 11, Verified: 4), 1 quick action (Staff Verification)

rm_welcome_page_elements.detail: Greeting 'Good morning, Vikram Reddy', 3 role-specific stats (My Leads, Active, Won), 2 quick actions (My Pipeline, Performance)

quick_action_navigation.detail: Admin 'Operations Dashboard' navigates to /team/admin/dashboard, RM 'My Pipeline' navigates to /team/rm/dashboard

sidebar_home_link_returns_to_dashboard.detail: Clicking 'Home' in sidebar returns to /team/dashboard for all roles

sidebar_home_link_highlighted.detail: Home link is highlighted (active) when on /team/dashboard

logout_redirects_to_team_login.detail: Logout from user menu redirects to /team/login

context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Welcome Dashboard feature is fully working. All roles (Admin, HR, RM) login to /team/dashboard with role-specific stats and quick actions. Backend API /api/team/dashboard returns correct data for each role. Sidebar 'Home' link navigates to /team/dashboard and is properly highlighted. data-testid attributes: team-welcome-page, welcome-greeting, quick-stats-grid, quick-actions-grid, recent-activity-list, stat-{label}, quick-action-{label}, nav-home.
